topic: 72-hour fast doubles HGH levels — what the data shows
caption:
Did you know a 72-hour fast can supercharge your Human Growth Hormone (HGH) levels by up to 1300%? 🤯 This isn't just about weight loss; it's about deep cellular repair, muscle preservation, and a profound metabolic reset. As your body depletes glucose stores, it triggers a powerful cascade of events, optimizing hormone production and initiating autophagy – where your cells clean out damaged components. Studies confirm these dramatic HGH surges are key to anti-aging and regeneration. Unlock your body's innate healing potential! ✨🔬💪

💾 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to understand the power of fasting. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health insights. Don't forget — your future body will thank you! 🚀
